---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug or unexpected behavior
title: "bug: "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: zaryif
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

```
1.
2.
3.
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the exact error message or output.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| quran-cli version | `quran --version` |
| Python version | `python3 --version` |
| OS | macOS / Linux / Windows |
| Shell | zsh / bash / fish / PowerShell |
| Installation | pip / git clone |

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (config file contents, terminal screenshot, etc.).
